channel.title: Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories, Inc. (sel).

image.title: Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories, Inc. — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2025-48018 · 7.5 HIGH — Deserialization of Untrusted Data
item.description: An authenticated user can modify application state data.

item.title: CVE-2025-48017 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory
item.description: Improper limitation of pathname in Circuit Provisioning and File Import applications allows modification and uploading of files

item.title: CVE-2025-48016 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Improper Control of Interaction Frequency
item.description: OpenFlow discovery protocol can exhaust resources because it is not rate limited

item.title: CVE-2025-48015 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️ — Observable Response Discrepancy
item.description: Failed login response could be different depending on whether the username was local or central.

item.title: CVE-2025-48014 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts
item.description: Password guessing limits could be bypassed when using LDAP authentication.

item.title: CVE-2025-46743 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Cross-Site Request Forgery
item.description: An authenticated user's token could be used by another source after the user had logged out prior to the token expiring.

item.title: CVE-2025-46750 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Authentication Bypass
item.description: SEL BIOS packages prior to 1.3.49152.117 or 2.6.49152.98 allow a local attacker to bypass password authentication and change password-protected BIOS settings by importing a BIOS settings file with no password set.

item.title: CVE-2025-46749 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Improper Neutralization of Input
item.description: An authenticated user could submit scripting to fields that lack proper input and output sanitization leading to subsequent client-side script execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-46748 · 2.7 LOW — Unverified Password Change
item.description: An authenticated user attempting to change their password could do so without using the current password.

item.title: CVE-2025-46747 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Exposure of Sensitive System Information
item.description: An authenticated user without user-management permissions could identify other user accounts.

item.title: CVE-2025-46746 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Error Message Contains Sensitive Information
item.description: An administrator could discover another account's credentials.

item.title: CVE-2025-46745 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Improper Privilege Management
item.description: An authenticated user without user-management permissions could view other users account information.

item.title: CVE-2025-46744 · 2.7 LOW — Improper Privilege Management
item.description: An authenticated administrator could modify the Created By username for a user account

item.title: CVE-2025-46742 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Improper Access Control
item.description: Users who were required to change their password could still access system information before changing their password

item.title: CVE-2025-46741 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Improper Privilege Management
item.description: A suspended or recently logged-out user could continue to interact with Blueframe until the time-out period occurred.

item.title: CVE-2025-46740 · 7.5 HIGH — Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions
item.description: An authenticated user without user administrative permissions could change the administrator Account Name.

item.title: CVE-2025-46739 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts
item.description: An unauthenticated user could discover account credentials via a brute-force attack without rate limiting

item.title: CVE-2025-46738 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Deserialization of Untrusted Data
item.description: An authenticated attacker can maliciously modify layout data files in the SEL-5033 installation directory to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2025-46737 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — Origin Validation Error
item.description: SEL-5037 Grid Configurator contains an overly permissive Cross Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) configuration for a data gateway service in the application. This gateway service includes an API which is not properly configured to reject requests from u…

item.title: CVE-2024-2103 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Inclusion of Undocumented Features
item.description: Inclusion of undocumented features vulnerability accessible when logged on with a privileged access level on the following Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories relays could allow the relay to behave unpredictably: SEL-700BT Motor Bus Transfer Relay, S…

item.title: CVE-2023-2267 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Improper input validation could lead to reflection injection attacks
item.description: An Improper Input Validation vulnerability in Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-411L could allow an attacker to perform reflection attacks against an authorized and authenticated user. See product Instruction Manual Appendix A dated 20230830 fo…

item.title: CVE-2023-2266 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Improper neutralization of input during web page generation could lead to cross-site scripting based attacks
item.description: An Improper neutralization of input during web page generation in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-411L could allow an attacker to generate cross-site scripting based attacks against an authorized and authenticated user. See product Instru…

item.title: CVE-2023-2265 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Improper restriction of rendered UI layers or frames could lead to clickjacking attack
item.description: An Improper Restriction of Rendered UI Layers or Frames in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-411L could allow an unauthenticated attacker to perform clickjacking based attacks against an authenticated and authorized user. See product Instru…

item.title: CVE-2023-2264 · 4 MEDIUM — Improper input validition could lead to code injection
item.description: An improper input validation vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-411L could allow a malicious actor to manipulate authorized users to click on a link that could allow undesired behavior. See product Instruction Manual Appendi…

item.title: CVE-2023-34390 · 4.5 MEDIUM — Improper input validation could lead to denial of service
item.description: An input validation vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-451 could allow a remote authenticated attacker to create a denial of service against the system and locking out services. See product Instruction Manual Appendix A date…

item.title: CVE-2023-34389 · 4.5 MEDIUM — Allocation of resources without limits could lead to denial of service
item.description: An allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-451 could allow a remote authenticated attacker to make the system unavailable for an indefinite amount of time. See product Instruct…

item.title: CVE-2023-34388 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Improper authentication could lead to session hijacking
item.description: An Improper Authentication vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-451 could allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to potentially perform session hijacking attack and bypass authentication. See product Instruction Manual Append…

item.title: CVE-2023-31177 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Improper neutralizataion of input could lead to execution of arbitrary code
item.description: An Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-451 could allow an attacker to craft a link that could execute arbitrary code on a victim's system. See product Ins…

item.title: CVE-2023-31176 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Insufficient entropy vulnerability could lead to authentication bypass
item.description: An Insufficient Entropy vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-451 could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to brute-force session tokens and bypass authentication. See product Instruction Manual Appendix A dated 20230830…

item.title: CVE-2023-34392 · 8.2 HIGH — Missing Authentication for Critical Function
item.description: A Missing Authentication for Critical Function vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5037 SEL Grid Configurator could allow an attacker to run arbitrary commands on managed devices by an authorized device operator. See Instruct…

item.title: CVE-2023-34391 · 7.4 HIGH — Insecure Inherited Permissions
item.description: Insecure Inherited Permissions vulnerability in Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5033 AcSELerator RTAC Software on Windows allows Leveraging/Manipulating Configuration File Search Paths. See Instruction Manual Appendix A [Cybersecurity] tag da…

item.title: CVE-2023-31175 · 8.8 HIGH — Execution with Unnecessary Privileges
item.description: An Execution with Unnecessary Privileges vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5037 SEL Grid Configurator could allow an attacker to run system commands with the highest level privilege on the system. See Instruction Manual App…

item.title: CVE-2023-31174 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
item.description: A Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5037 SEL Grid Configurator could allow an attacker to embed instructions that could be executed by an authorized device operator. See Instruction Manual…

item.title: CVE-2023-31173 · 7.7 HIGH — Use of Hard-coded Credentials
item.description: Use of Hard-coded Credentials vulnerability in Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5037 SEL Grid Configurator on Windows allows Authentication Bypass. See Instruction Manual Appendix A and Appendix E dated 20230615 for more details. This issue af…

item.title: CVE-2023-31172 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Incomplete Filtering of Special Elements
item.description: An Incomplete Filtering of Special Elements vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5030 acSELerator QuickSet Software could allow an attacker to embed instructions that could be executed by an authorized device operator. See Ins…

item.title: CVE-2023-31171 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
item.description: An Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5030 acSELerator QuickSet Software could allow an attacker to embed instructions that could be execut…

item.title: CVE-2023-31170 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
item.description: An Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5030 acSELerator QuickSet Software could allow an attacker to embed instructions that could be executed by an authorized device o…

item.title: CVE-2023-31169 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Improper Handling of Unicode Encoding
item.description: An Improper Handling of Unicode Encoding vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5030 acSELerator QuickSet Software could allow an attacker to embed instructions that could be executed by an authorized device operator. See Instru…

item.title: CVE-2023-31168 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
item.description: An Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5030 acSELerator QuickSet Software could allow an attacker to embed instructions that could be executed by an authorized device o…

item.title: CVE-2023-31167 · 5 MEDIUM — Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories SEL-5036 acSELerator Bay Screen Builder Software on Windows allows Relative Path Traversal. SEL acSELerator Bay Screen…

item.title: CVE-2023-31166 · 4.1 MEDIUM — Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory
item.description: An Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories Real-Time Automation Controller (SEL RTAC) Web Interface could allow a remote authenticated attacker to create…

item.title: CVE-2023-31165 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation
item.description: An Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories Real-Time Automation Controller (SEL RTAC) Web Interface could allow a remote authenticated attacker to i…

item.description: An Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories Real-Time Automation Controller (SEL RTAC) Web Interface could allow a remote authenticated attacker to i…

item.description: An Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories Real-Time Automation Controller (SEL RTAC) Web Interface could allow a remote authenticated attacker to i…

item.title: CVE-2023-31162 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Improper Input Validation in Web Interface
item.description: An Improper Input Validation vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories Real-Time Automation Controller (SEL RTAC) Web Interface could allow a remote authenticated attacker to arbitrarily alter the content of a configuration file. See S…

item.title: CVE-2023-31161 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Improper Input Validation in Web Interface
item.description: An Improper Input Validation vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories Real-Time Automation Controller (SEL RTAC) Web Interface could allow an authenticated remote attacker to use internal resources, allowing a variety of potential eff…

item.title: CVE-2023-31160 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation
item.description: An Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories Real-Time Automation Controller (SEL RTAC) Web Interface could allow a remote authenticated attacker to i…

item.description: An Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories Real-Time Automation Controller (SEL RTAC) Web Interface could allow a remote authenticated attacker to i…

item.description: An Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in the Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories Real-Time Automation Controller (SEL RTAC) Web Interface could allow a remote authenticated attacker to i…
